Developer experience

Interactive experiences

Installing Ansible Dev Container in VS Code

Set up a portable Ansible development environment in VS Code with the Ansible Dev Container (Podman or Docker) for playbook and role development across platforms.

YouTube

How to set up Cursor with MCP for Ansible Automation Platform

Step-by-step setup to connect Cursor with a Model Context Protocol server for AAP: API tokens, validation, and launching automation jobs from Cursor.

Talk to your Ansible Automation Platform with AI — Copilot Studio + MCP

Connect your LLM to AAP using an MCP server and Microsoft Copilot Studio: API tokens, custom connectors, OpenAPI, Bearer auth, and real automation queries.

IBM Bob + MCP for Ansible Automation Platform

How to set up IBM Bob with an MCP server for Ansible Automation Platform — step-by-step walkthrough.

Let’s test your Ansible skills with F1 arcade racing.

Let’s race — Built to Automate

Demo

Open in new tab

Red Hat Interact blocks running these guided experiences inside an embedded frame on external sites (standard browser security). The demo itself is fine — it just needs to open in its own tab.
